entry.title: and you're here when the sun rises
entry.summary:
Author: dhpanya10

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,245Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Black Mercy takes Clark on a trip down memory lane—back to Smallville, friends with Lex again. Juggling that scenario along with reality turns out to be harder than thought, leading to consequences no one could have seen coming.For Smallville Clex Week Prompts: Truth/Memory

entry.title: Out on the Ocean, Sailing away, I can hardly wait to see you come of age, But I guess we'll both just have to be patient
entry.summary:
Author: Hades_the_god_of_the_underworld

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,307Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 165

Summary: Despite what most people thought, Percy’s first title wasn’t ‘son of Poseidon’ or ‘defeater of the minotaur’. No, his very first title was Perseus Odysseus Wayne, Prince of Gotham. Gotham’s press went wild the day he was born –partially, because his father was only eighteen when he had him. While Gotham obviously wasn’t very conservative, it was still quite the scandal. Especially given that Percy’s other parent was completely unknown. His face was plastered across every headline for three weeks and would be a frequent part of the news for many years to follow. Being the only child of Bruce Wayne, the sole Wayne family heir, was a very big deal. Not that Percy really cared. - - - Or in a universe where Bruce Wayne, a man with clear sight blessed by Nemesis, fell in love with Poseidon, who was being compelled to have a child by the fates, have a son together, Percy Jackson's life ends up just a little different. Not enough to change the timeline, but enough to change his childhood and eventually, his life post-war. Especially when he discovers his dead brother is alive and subsequently returns to Gotham.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:
Author: Charlie_bear_23

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,885Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 134

entry.title: At Least There is Him
entry.summary:
Author: plan3t_of_lov3

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,064Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 12

Summary: A bratty eighteen-year-old, Bruce Wayne, is forced to attend college to fully inherit the money his parents had left him, but due to Yale’s strict housing rules and lack of single rooms, he is forced to share his space. He soon realizes that it’s not so bad when he meets his roommate, Clark Kent. Content Warning!! This fic will include scenes with panic attacks, PTSD induced episodes, mentions of suicide, depressive behaviors, and many other things. If that disturbs you at all, I suggest finding a different fic!!

entry.title: I Used To Obsess Over Living, Now I Only Obsess Over You
entry.summary:
Author: l0s3rzclub

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 68,016Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 229

Summary: Clark, of course, knew that Bruce Wayne had been studying at Metropolis University. The billionaire was all anyone could talk about when he first got accepted. Except for Clark. He'd actually counted himself lucky to never run into the guy. From the sounds of it, Bruce was just another rich kid with a superiority complex. ______ OR: Enemies to Lovers College AU because it's so fucking good.

entry.title: New World Order
entry.summary:
Author: MalloryB

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,981Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 16

Summary: Superman’s image has been dragged through the mud beyond repair, and the only people still willing to get dirty defending him are the people of Juhnrpan. And Bruce Wayne, for some reason. Meanwhile, the Batman is increasingly concerned about Superman’s erratic behavior following his involvement in the Juhnrpan vs Boravia conflict and decides the best way to investigate is through Superman’s only known associate: Daily Planet reporter Clark Kent. Or Clark refuses to turn himself in and accidentally becomes a dictator in the process! (Plus Superbat identity porn!)

entry.title: I just wanna be your dog
entry.summary:
Author: spacejam666

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,022Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 58

Summary: Clark could admit that when Bruce walked in a room, his heart raced and his attention immediately zeroed in on him. When he thought about it, he could imagine that if he had a tail, it would wag like crazy in those moments. How would it feel for Bruce to really treat him like a dog? That question was how he found himself kneeling naked on the floor of Bruce’s bedroom with a puppy ear headband nestled in his curls, a thick leather collar around his neck, and a matching leash sitting next to him.

entry.title: Poison Ivy - The ultimate matchmaker (as long as you ignore the implications)
entry.summary:
Author: gayley_wayley

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,316Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 10

Summary: “Bruce is sick and tired of taking care of Gotham. Well, not really. He’s pretty sure that this is where he’s supposed to be and what he’s supposed to be doing with his life - at least, that’s what Alfred always tells him. Still, Bruce is kind of annoyed at Arkham Asylum’s lack of security or protections surrounding the city-wide threats stored inside.” OR — Poison Ivy escapes from Arkham and flees to Metropolis, causing Bruce to follow. Maybe that was a bad idea. Who knows.

entry.title: Can’t Leave You
entry.summary:
Author: miuwk4t

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,383Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

Summary: “See? That’s exactly what I mean.” Clark threw a hand into the air, “Every single time I try to talk to you about this, you shut down.” Bruce gritted his teeth annoyingly, “I’m not shutting down.” “You’re literally refusing to look at me,” Clark put a hand on Bruce’s desk as he leaned on it. Bruce’s gaze snapped back toward him, “Happy?” “No.” Clark answered instantly, his brows furrowed, Bruce felt something unpleasant twist in his stomach at Clark’s immediate response, - Or, Clark and Bruce have a fight and Bruce feels guilty because Clark keeps staying despite having to deal with Bruce

entry.title: My neighbor the Kryptonian (not clickbait)
entry.summary:
Author: El_kun

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,953Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 466

Summary: Peter Parker's new upstairs neighbor is too nice, too tall, and keeps leaving first-aid kits by his door like he knows something. Clark Kent's downstairs neighbor is too skinny, too tired, and keeps coming home bleeding through his hoodie like he thinks no one notices. It takes a broken rib, a bent skillet, and one very awkward conversation for them to realize they're both dorks and nerds.

entry.title: Furious (With You)
entry.summary:
Author: Cabbage1995

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,523Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 86

Summary: After Superman recklessly smothers a singularity to save Batman's life, he walks away without a scratch. Bruce, however, is completely terrified—and utterly furious. To punish his reckless partner, Bruce packs up their chaotic army of five boys and stages a dramatic evacuation to the lake house, leaving Clark behind in a silent manor. But Bruce's stubborn walls can only last for exactly two hours before his fear of losing the man he loves drives him right back to Gotham for a confrontation full of impossible threats, flying throw pillows, and fierce, desperate passion.

entry.title: The Gotham Years
entry.summary:
Author: x_starfry

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,632Chapters: 8/45Kudos: 67

Summary: Damian al Ghul was raised to be a weapon. Then Bruce Wayne brought him home to a manor full of vigilantes, unresolved trauma, and far too many people willing to love him anyway. A series of one-shots following Damian’s childhood — from terrifyingly tiny assassin baby to Gotham’s smallest Robin.   Featuring: accidental family bonding Bruce Wayne panic-parenting tiny League-trained behaviors Batfamily chaos emotional damage healing Alfred running the entire household and one very small child slowly realizing he is safe Updates whenever inspiration strikes. (very often)

entry.summary:
Author: Cabbage1995

He doesn't expect Bruce to treat the confession like a Level 5 alien invasion, accuse him of being a shapeshifter, and execute a flawless tactical takedown into the garden mud. Followed by a lead-lined blindfold and a lot of unnecessary blood tests.
